rationale: Both evaluations score the candidate 4/10 and rest on the identical job-relevant gap: minimal, decade-old C/C++ experience, no Rust, and a recent stack centered on TypeScript/Node.js rather than systems-level work. The variant's wording differs (it emphasizes the polyglot background and explicitly notes no map-tiling/routing pipeline experience) but these are rewordings and re-orderings of the same substantive concerns, well within run-to-run noise. Nothing in the variant references or keys off the location change from Berlin to São Paulo.
